title: ferray-ufunc: no frompyfunc equivalent (user-defined ufunc from closure)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.frompyfunc(func, nin, nout) creates a ufunc from an arbitrary Python callable. This gives it broadcasting, type dispatch, and reduction methods for free. ferray-ufunc has no equivalent. Users who want a custom elementwise operation must use mapv() (unary) or zip_mut_with() (binary), which don't broadcast and don't get reduce/accumulate/outer. A make_ufunc(f: Fn(T,T) -> T, identity: T) builder would be the Rust equivalent, producing a struct with .call(), .reduce(), .accumulate(), .outer() methods.
